faq_subtitle: Find a quick answer before reaching out to us.
faq_not_found: Can't find what you're looking for?

items.q: How do I access my courses after signing up?
items.a: Go to your personal space via the top-right menu. All your purchased or free courses are listed there, ready to follow at your own pace.
Not yet. We're working on an offline mode coming soon. For now, an internet connection is required to access the content.

items.q: Can I learn at my own pace?
items.a: Yes, all our courses are fully self-paced. No live sessions, no expiry dates — advance whenever you want and come back as many times as you need.

items.q: How do I change my password?
items.a: From your profile, go to security settings and click "Change Password". A confirmation link will be sent to your email address.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
items.a: In your profile, under "Personal Data", you will find the deletion option. In accordance with GDPR, all your data is permanently erased within 30 days.

items.q: How do I unsubscribe from the newsletter?
items.a: Click the "Unsubscribe" link at the bottom of any email you received. You can also do it from your profile, under the "Notifications" tab.

items.q: How do I suggest an article topic?
items.a: Use the form below and select the "Content Suggestion" topic. We read all suggestions, even if we can't always act on them right away.

items.q: Are articles available in multiple languages?
items.a: Yes, the site is available in French and English. Use the language selector in the navigation menu to switch. Some articles may only be available in one language.
